title: The Unmapped Field

features.name: innocent grove
features.desc-on-touch: You stand among trees that have never been compared to anything. They do not yet know they are being read.

features.name: clearing threshold
features.desc-on-touch: The edge where mapped lands end and unmapped country begins. The archive has not yet cast its net here.

features.name: unread stone
features.desc-on-touch: A marker that holds no filed meaning, no comparative reference. The stone remembers only its own weight.

features.name: bright absence
features.desc-on-touch: Where the corruption could have arrived but has not yet. A space the archive has not learned to compare against itself.

features.name: first grass record
features.desc-on-touch: Grass itself, unmediated—no drone recorded it, no poet named it, no file claims it. It simply grows.

inscription: nothing here has learned yet that it is being read

file.name: Uncompared_Clearing_Daylight_1410hrs.mp3
file.note: Field recording: wind, grass-shear, one bird, no named species—archived before its own name could arrive

exits.label: back toward the trees that have read themselves
into deepening scrub where the canopy thickens and comparisons begin
across open country toward distant smoke
